_README: This file defines the candidate onboarding form. Edit it to add, remove, reword, or reorder questions WITHOUT touching any code.
After editing, the change is live on the next page reload — no rebuild, no restart.
TOP LEVEL:
steps[]   ordered list of steps shown in the wizard
STEP:
key       internal id (do not change once a question has answers in the DB)
title     header shown to the candidate
subtitle  optional small text under the title
questions[]   list of questions on this step
QUESTION:
key       maps to a column on CandidateProfile (or to onboardingData JSON for legacy free-text fields)
label     the text the candidate sees
help      optional gray helper text under the input
required  true | false
type      one of:
text          single-line text input
textarea      multi-line text input
number        numeric input
select        dropdown — needs `options`
radio         radio buttons — needs `options`
checkboxes    multi-select boxes — needs `options`
boolean       single checkbox
phone-intl    country code dropdown + phone number
years-select  single dropdown for years of experience
role-picker   pick one role from the JobRole taxonomy (supports allowOther)
role-multi    pick many roles from JobRole (supports allowOther)
skill-multi   pick many skills from Skill (supports allowOther)
industry-multi  pick many industries from Industry (supports allowOther)
salary-range  min/max/currency triple input
languages     list of {language, level} entries
country-city  country dropdown + city text
tags          chip input — press Enter to add
options[] for select/radio/checkboxes — array of strings OR {value,label} objects
allowOther  for role-picker/role-multi/skill-multi/industry-multi — shows a text input so the candidate can type something the taxonomy doesn't cover; answer saved to `<key>Other` in onboardingData
visibleIf optional condition: { key: 'otherQuestionKey', equals: 'value' } or { key: ..., notEquals: ... } or { key: ..., in: [...] }
placeholder optional placeholder text

questions.label: Your current role
questions.help: Pick the closest match — if nothing fits, type your own.

questions.label: Your skills
questions.help: Search and pick as many as apply. Anything missing? Add it as free text.

questions.label: Are you willing to switch from your current role?

options.label: Yes, open to a new role

questions.label: Willing to switch career path to similar roles based on your certifications or degree?
What industries are you looking for?
questions.help: Pick the industries you want to work in.

questions.label: What kind of positions are you looking for? (up to 3)
questions.help: Pick up to three roles you'd like to be considered for.

questions.label: Any technical skills you'd like to highlight (even if not prominent on your CV)?
questions.help: Optional. Things you're good at but your CV may not emphasise.

questions.label: Specific cities or regions you'd relocate to
questions.placeholder: Type a city and press Enter
questions.help: Optional. Leave blank if you're open to anywhere in the chosen scope.

questions.label: Do you need visa sponsorship now or in the future?

options.label: No — I can work without sponsorship
Not now, but I will in the future

questions.label: Where you can legally work today
Benefit expectations
questions.placeholder: e.g. health insurance, stock, learning budget, 30 days PTO…
questions.help: Optional. Anything beyond salary that matters to you.

questions.label: When can you start a new role?
Languages you speak
questions.help: Add each language and your level (A1–C2 or Native).
